topic: AI-supervised apprenticeship for frontier scientific work
goal: Explore the boundary between AI-accelerated research assistance and genuine autonomous scientific judgment in expert-supervised workflows.
seed_questions: Which parts of scientific apprenticeship can be safely delegated to AI, and which still depend on expert taste and verification?
Does AI mainly compress execution time, or can it also accelerate the development of scientific judgment in the human supervisor?

seed_definitions.name: G2-style problem
seed_definitions.meaning: A well-scoped research problem with established methods and checkable endpoints, analogous to work a second-year graduate student might tackle.

seed_definitions.name: verification burden
seed_definitions.meaning: The amount of expert review required to confirm that an AI-generated result is actually correct rather than merely plausible.
